posts.author: lezflano (Lee Flanagan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there,

So my company uses Monday as their primary PM tool and it’s great, but I’m looking to syncing some of our boards into Slack lists as a way to cut down on back and forth. It looks like there’s a workflow option for this but when I try authorise the Monday app I get an invalid scope error. Is the app still maintained?

Screenshot 2025-04-07 at 14.40.482638×344 134 KB
